en: Does your organization have a formal Environmental Management System?
Do your organization have an Environmental Policy?
Has your company stated your Management commitment & expectations to environmental protection and management?
Does your company ensure your company has competent advice with regard to environmental management?
Has your company defined environmental responsibilities for managers, supervisors & workers?
Does your company regularly evaluate and revise your policies and procedures?
Does your company have a procedure for reporting environmental accident and incidents and investigating the immediate and root cause of these?

Do you have mechanisms in place for communicating environmental issues with your workforce and supply chain? Check all that apply
\nEnvironmental Briefings
Does the service your company provides require a permit with the local authority or Environment Agency?
If yes, please provide a copy of the Permit:
Does the Permit cover all activities/services performed by your organization?
If yes, please provide details of the Permit Deployment process/form to be completed prior to starting work onsite:
If no, which activities/services are covered by your certification?
Does your company have a system in place for identifying significant environmental aspects and impacts of your operations?
Are environmental controls integrated into Safe Systems of Work/ Method Statements/Standard Operating Procedures?
